zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicia Haddon於大約1323年出生在英國多瑟特武普爾時，她的父親Henry Haddon11321歲，母親Alianor Furneaux26歲。她於大約1359年與William FitzWarin在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯圖頓 考德爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年3月5日之後，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏望塔。

nameMeanings.name: Haddon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, in Derbyshire, Northamptonshire, Huntingdonshire, and Devon, named with Old English hǣth ‘heathland, heather’ + dūn ‘hill’, or from Haddon in Cambridgeshire, which is probably named from the Old English personal name Headda + dūn.

variants.name: Hadden
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Hadden, Halden, or Haulden (Roxburghshire), or a variant of   Haldane  .
Irish (Armagh and Tyrone): though mainly Scottish, this surname is sometimes used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉidín ‘descendant of Éidín’ (see Hayden ).

variants.name: Haden
meanings: English (West Midlands): variant of   Haddon   and   Haydon  .
Perhaps an altered form of German   Hadden   or   Heiden  .

variants.name: Hedden
meanings: English: habitational name from Hedon (East Yorkshire), Headon (Nottinghamshire), Black Heddon (Northumberland), Heddon on the Wall (Northumberland), Heddon in Filleigh (Devon), or Headon Hill (Isle of Wight). Most of the placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + dūn ‘hill’, though the Nottinghamshire placename probably has hēah ‘high’ as the initial element.
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Hadden  .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Amicia Haddon was born about 1323, in Upcerne, Dorset, England, her father, Henry Haddon, was 11321 and her mother, Alianor Furneaux, was 26. She married William FitzWarin about 1359, in Stourton Caundle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died after 5 March 1348, and was buried in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicia Haddon est née environ 1323, à Upcerne, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Henry Haddon, avait 11321 ans et sa mère, Alianor Furneaux, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William FitzWarin environ 1359, à Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 5 mars 1348, et a été enterrée à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato William FitzWarin circa 1359, nel Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Amicia Haddonが約1323年にイギリスドールセトウプセルンで生まれた時，父Henry Haddonは11321歳，母Alianor Furneauxは26歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスドールセトストウルトン カウンドルでWilliam FitzWarinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1348年3月5日以後に死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicia Haddon(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 도르세트 업서니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Haddon(은)는 11321세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianor Furneaux(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스토우르턴 카운들일에서 William FitzWarin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 3월 5일 이후 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 완타지에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William FitzWarin aproximadamente 1359, em Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicia Haddon родилась около 1323 г. в местности упсирн, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Haddon было 11321 год, а матери, которую звали Alianor Furneaux, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William FitzWarin около 1359 г. в местности стоуртон каундл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 5 марта 1348 г. и была похоронена в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
